name: enhancement-hooks-plan
question: What enhancements will the chat domain need?
decision: models: ChatSession.messageCount, ChatSession.latestMessage; collections: chatSessionCollection.findByStatus; rootStore: createChatSession action, recordArtifact action
rationale: Views compute derived values from raw fields. Collection helpers enable common queries. Root actions coordinate multi-entity operations like starting a new chat or recording artifacts created.
